meta.title: Gen SEA Summit 2026 — Apply for Scholarship
meta.description: Win your seat. 50 students. One room. ASEAN's next decade starts here.

theme.title: Building Amidst Chaos
theme.subtitle: The theme of Gen SEA Summit 2026
theme.body: 2026 is a year of immense challenge — global economic volatility, accelerating climate change, and AI reshaping every industry. Yet within this uncertainty lies extraordinary opportunity. ASEAN has over 200 million young people, and this next generation holds the power to drive the region forward. Gen SEA Summit 2026 is where 50 students will learn from leaders, build networks, and launch their entrepreneurial journeys.

items.name: Wellness & Longevity
items.description: The new economy of human flourishing

benefits.title: What You Get
items: Fast-track to SEA Bridge Fellowships & internships
Experience Khon Kaen during Isan Creative Festival 2026

steps.title: Top 50 selected based on Bootcamp + application

footer.copyright: © 2026 SEA Bridge Institute of Entrepreneurship. All rights reserved.

apply.title: Apply for Gen SEA Delegates Scholarship

step1.title: Student Identity
step1.nameThPlaceholder: e.g. ธนกฤต เสริมสุขสันต์
step1.contactHelper: At least one of LINE ID or Discord must be filled

step3.title: Recommender
step3.profEmailError: Please use an institutional email (e.g. ending in .ac.th)

step4.title: Scholarship Essay
step4.prompt: Tell us why you want to join Gen SEA Summit 2026 and the venture idea or sector challenge you're most excited to explore (200–500 words).
step4.helper: Your essay is the most important part of your application. Be specific.

step5.title: Logistics & Consent
step5.accommodationHelper: Accommodation is provided to Top 25 only. Other delegates receive a subsidized booking link.
step5.consent1: I consent to SEA Bridge collecting and processing my personal data, including sharing with event sponsors and partners, in accordance with Thailand's Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).
step5.consent2: I allow Gen SEA Summit to use my name and photo in promotional materials.
step5.consent3: I confirm that all information submitted is true and accurate.

success.title: Application received
success.body: We've sent a confirmation to {email}. Selection results will be announced 7 June 2026. In the meantime, watch for the Bootcamp invite — Bootcamp begins 16 May.
